title: agrostis borealis subsp. hyperborea
intro: Agrostis borealis subsp. hyperborea, commonly known as Arctic bentgrass, is a perennial grass species native to the Arctic tundra. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis borealis subsp. hyperborea include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with some herbalists also using it in tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
